allow: Bash(timeout 10 node -e "const m = await import\(''@livekit/rtc-node''\); const src = new m.AudioSource\(16000, 1\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(src\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\)\); console.log\(proto.captureFrame.toString\(\).substring\(0, 400\)\); process.exit\(0\);")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*','HKLM:\\Software\\WOW6432Node\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*','HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.DisplayName -like '*amp*' } | Select-Object DisplayName,InstallDate,UninstallString | Format-List")
